name: Configuration Loader
description: Loads and validates arbiter.yaml via a Pydantic Settings model. Exposes all configurable values for the Arbiter trust enforcement system including registry, trust scoring, soak testing, OTLP telemetry, API, classification registry, human gate, and ledger settings. Provides a global get_config() accessor for immutable configuration and handles default config generation for `arbiter init`. Source priority: defaults → YAML file → environment variables (prefix=ARBITER_, nested delimiter=__). All config is frozen/immutable after load. YAML source uses yaml.safe_load() exclusively.

types.name: DataClassificationTier
types.description: Data classification tiers used across the Arbiter system. StrEnum for YAML/JSON serialization compatibility.

fields.name: path
fields.description: Filesystem path to the registry directory. Resolved as pathlib.Path at runtime.

fields.name: append_only
fields.description: Whether the registry operates in append-only mode (no overwrites).

types.name: TrustConfig

fields.name: floor
fields.description: Minimum trust score floor. Trust scores cannot decay below this value.

fields.name: authority_override_floor
fields.description: Minimum trust score required for authority override operations. Must be >= trust.floor.

fields.name: decay_lambda
fields.description: Exponential decay rate lambda for trust score time-based decay.

fields.name: conflict_trust_delta_threshold
fields.description: Minimum trust score delta between conflicting nodes to trigger a conflict finding.

fields.name: taint_lock_tiers
fields.description: List of DataClassificationTier values for which taint-lock is enforced. Nodes handling data at these tiers have stricter trust requirements.

types.description: Configuration for trust score computation, decay, and conflict thresholds. All policy calculations use raw trust score, never display tiers.

types.name: TaintLockTiersList
types.description: List of DataClassificationTier values for taint lock enforcement.

types.name: SoakDurationsMap

fields.name: PUBLIC
fields.description: Soak duration in seconds for PUBLIC tier.

fields.name: INTERNAL
fields.description: Soak duration in seconds for INTERNAL tier.

fields.name: CONFIDENTIAL
fields.description: Soak duration in seconds for CONFIDENTIAL tier.

fields.name: RESTRICTED
fields.description: Soak duration in seconds for RESTRICTED tier.

fields.name: CRITICAL
fields.description: Soak duration in seconds for CRITICAL tier.

types.description: Mapping from DataClassificationTier to base soak duration in seconds. Keys must be valid DataClassificationTier variants.

types.name: SoakConfig

fields.name: base_durations
fields.description: Mapping of DataClassificationTier to base soak duration in seconds.

fields.name: target_requests
fields.description: Target number of requests to observe during soak period before promotion.

types.description: Configuration for soak testing parameters — duration and request volume gates per classification tier.

types.name: OtlpConfig

fields.name: listen_port
fields.description: gRPC port for OTLP telemetry ingestion.

validators.error_message: otlp.listen_port must be a valid port number (1-65535)

fields.name: http_port
fields.description: HTTP port for OTLP telemetry ingestion.

validators.error_message: otlp.http_port must be a valid port number (1-65535)

types.description: Configuration for OpenTelemetry Protocol (OTLP) listener ports.

types.name: ApiConfig

fields.name: port
fields.description: HTTP port for the Arbiter API server.

validators.error_message: api.port must be a valid port number (1-65535)

types.description: Configuration for the Arbiter HTTP API server.

types.name: ClassificationRegistryConfig

fields.name: path
fields.description: Filesystem path to the classification registry file or directory. Resolved as pathlib.Path at runtime.

types.description: Configuration for the field classification registry.

types.name: HumanGateConfig

fields.name: webhook_url
fields.description: URL for the webhook to notify when a human gate is triggered. Empty string means no webhook configured.

fields.name: block_on_gate
fields.description: Whether to block (halt processing) when a human gate is triggered, waiting for approval. If false, gate is advisory only.

types.description: Configuration for the human-in-the-loop approval gate.

types.name: LedgerConfig

fields.name: checksum_interval
fields.description: Number of ledger entries between SHA256 checksum lines.

types.description: Configuration for the trust ledger (append-only JSONL with periodic SHA256 checksums).

types.name: ArbiterConfig

fields.name: config_version
fields.description: Configuration schema version for future migration support. Must be 1 for this version.

validators.error_message: config_version must be 1 for this contract version

fields.name: registry
fields.description: Component/service registry configuration section.

fields.name: trust
fields.description: Trust score computation and policy configuration section.

fields.name: soak
fields.description: Soak testing parameters configuration section.

fields.name: otlp
fields.description: OTLP telemetry listener configuration section.

fields.name: api
fields.description: HTTP API server configuration section.

fields.name: classification_registry
fields.description: Field classification registry configuration section.

fields.name: human_gate
fields.description: Human-in-the-loop approval gate configuration section.

fields.name: ledger
fields.description: Trust ledger configuration section.

types.description: Root configuration model for the Arbiter system. Composes all section configs. Extends Pydantic BaseSettings with frozen immutability and custom YAML settings source. Source priority: defaults → YAML → env vars (prefix=ARBITER_, nested delimiter=__).

types.name: ConfigurationError

fields.name: config_path
fields.description: Filesystem path of the config file that failed validation.

fields.name: message
fields.description: Human-readable error message including file path and specific field/value details.

fields.name: validation_errors
fields.description: List of individual field-level validation error detail dicts from Pydantic.

types.description: Exception wrapping Pydantic ValidationError with file path context. Raised when config file is present but contains invalid values. Includes the file path, the original validation errors, and a human-readable message suitable for CLI display via click.

types.name: ValidationErrorDetail

fields.name: field
fields.description: Dot-separated field path (e.g. 'trust.floor').

fields.name: message
fields.description: Human-readable validation error message.

fields.name: value
fields.description: String representation of the invalid value.

types.description: A single field-level validation error extracted from Pydantic ValidationError.

types.name: ValidationErrorList
types.description: List of individual validation error details.

types.name: ConfigNotLoadedError

fields.name: message
fields.default: Configuration not loaded. Call load_config() before get_config().
fields.description: Error message indicating config was not loaded.

types.description: Exception raised when get_config() is called before load_config(). Indicates the module-level singleton has not been initialized.

types.name: OptionalPath
types.description: An optional filesystem path string. None means use default resolution (look for arbiter.yaml in cwd).

functions.name: load_config
functions.description: Loads, validates, and caches the Arbiter configuration from a YAML file. If path is None, looks for 'arbiter.yaml' in the current working directory. If the file does not exist at the resolved path, falls back to defaults (with env var overrides). Stores the resulting ArbiterConfig in the module-level singleton. Subsequent calls overwrite the cached config. Source priority: defaults → YAML file contents → environment variables.

inputs.name: path
inputs.description: Path to the arbiter.yaml config file. If None, defaults to './arbiter.yaml'. Resolved via pathlib.Path.

error_cases.name: validation_error
error_cases.condition: YAML file or env vars contain values that fail Pydantic validation (type mismatch, out-of-range, cross-field constraint violation)

error_data.config_path: Path to the invalid config file
error_data.message: Includes specific field and value details

error_cases.name: yaml_parse_error
error_cases.condition: YAML file exists but contains malformed YAML syntax that yaml.safe_load() cannot parse

error_cases.name: permission_error
error_cases.condition: YAML file exists but the process lacks read permissions

error_cases.name: cross_field_validation_error
error_cases.condition: trust.floor > trust.authority_override_floor or other cross-field constraint violations

preconditions: If path is provided, it must be a string representing a valid filesystem path or a pathlib.Path
If the YAML file exists, it must be readable by the current process
postconditions: The returned ArbiterConfig is fully validated against all field constraints and cross-field invariants
The module-level _config singleton is set to the returned ArbiterConfig instance
get_config() will return this same instance until load_config() or reset_config() is called again
trust.floor <= trust.authority_override_floor in the returned config

structured_side_effects.target: arbiter.yaml config file at resolved path
structured_side_effects.description: Reads YAML config file via pathlib.Path.read_text() and yaml.safe_load()
Sets or overwrites the cached ArbiterConfig singleton

functions.name: get_config
functions.description: Returns the cached ArbiterConfig singleton. Must be called after load_config(). This is the primary accessor for all Arbiter components to retrieve configuration values. Returns the same immutable instance on every call until reset_config() or another load_config() call.

error_cases.name: config_not_loaded
error_cases.condition: load_config() has not been called, or reset_config() was called without a subsequent load_config()

error_data.message: Configuration not loaded. Call load_config() before get_config().

preconditions: load_config() must have been called successfully at least once prior to this call
postconditions: Returns the same ArbiterConfig instance that was set by the most recent load_config() call

structured_side_effects.description: Pure accessor — reads module-level singleton without mutation

functions.name: reset_config
functions.description: Resets the module-level _config singleton to None. Primarily used in testing to ensure clean state between test cases. After calling this, get_config() will raise ConfigNotLoadedError until load_config() is called again.
postconditions: The module-level _config singleton is set to None
Subsequent get_config() calls will raise ConfigNotLoadedError until load_config() is called

functions.name: generate_default_config
functions.description: Generates an arbiter.yaml file with all default configuration values. Used by `arbiter init` CLI command. Instantiates ArbiterConfig() with all defaults, serializes via model_dump(mode='json'), and writes to the target path using yaml.dump(sort_keys=False). Includes a YAML header comment identifying the file as auto-generated. Will not overwrite an existing file unless overwrite=True.

inputs.name: path
inputs.description: Filesystem path where the default arbiter.yaml should be written. Resolved via pathlib.Path.

inputs.name: overwrite
inputs.description: Whether to overwrite an existing file at the target path.

error_cases.name: file_exists_no_overwrite
error_cases.condition: A file already exists at the target path and overwrite is False

error_data.message: File already exists at <path>. Use --force to overwrite.

error_cases.name: parent_directory_not_found
error_cases.condition: The parent directory of the target path does not exist

error_cases.name: permission_error
error_cases.condition: The process lacks write permissions to the target path or its parent directory

preconditions: The parent directory of path must exist and be writable by the current process
path must be a valid filesystem path string
postconditions: A valid YAML file exists at the specified path containing all ArbiterConfig defaults
The generated YAML file can be loaded by load_config() without errors
The file begins with a YAML header comment identifying it as auto-generated
YAML keys are in definition order (sort_keys=False)

structured_side_effects.description: Creates or overwrites YAML config file via pathlib.Path.write_text() with yaml.dump() output

functions.name: validate_config_file
functions.description: Validates an existing arbiter.yaml file without loading it into the module singleton. Parses and validates the file, returning the validated ArbiterConfig or raising ConfigurationError. Useful for CLI `arbiter config validate` command and CI checks.

inputs.name: path
inputs.description: Filesystem path to the arbiter.yaml config file to validate. Resolved via pathlib.Path.

error_cases.name: file_not_found
error_cases.condition: No file exists at the specified path

error_data.message: Includes specific field and value details

error_cases.name: permission_error
error_cases.condition: File exists but process lacks read permission

preconditions: path must point to an existing, readable file
The file must contain YAML content
postconditions: If no error is raised, the returned ArbiterConfig is fully valid
The module-level _config singleton is NOT modified

structured_side_effects.description: Reads and parses YAML file for validation without caching result

invariants: ArbiterConfig is frozen/immutable after construction — no field mutation allowed
The module-level _config singleton is either None or a fully validated ArbiterConfig instance
get_config() always returns the same ArbiterConfig instance until reset_config() is called
Source priority is always: defaults → YAML file → environment variables (ARBITER_ prefix, __ nested delimiter)
All Path fields use pathlib.Path; all timestamps use UTC
trust.floor <= trust.authority_override_floor (cross-field invariant)
trust.floor >= 0.0 and trust.floor <= 1.0
trust.authority_override_floor >= 0.0 and trust.authority_override_floor <= 1.0
trust.decay_lambda >= 0.0
trust.conflict_trust_delta_threshold >= 0.0 and trust.conflict_trust_delta_threshold <= 1.0
soak.target_requests >= 1
otlp.listen_port is a valid port number (1..65535)
otlp.http_port is a valid port number (1..65535)
api.port is a valid port number (1..65535)
ledger.checksum_interval >= 1
config_version == 1 for this contract version
Trust ledger is append-only — config cannot enable update or delete semantics
All soak.base_durations keys must be valid DataClassificationTier variants
All trust.taint_lock_tiers entries must be valid DataClassificationTier variants
YAML file is read via yaml.safe_load() exclusively — never yaml.load()
